title: 3PO (disambiguation)
content:
'''3PO''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''[[3PO-series protocol droid|3PO-series]]''' series of [[protocol droid]]s
**'''[[C-3PO]]''', a notable 3PO unit

==Legends==
*The '''[[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series]]''' of [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]]
**'''[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]''', a notable 3PO unit
**Other '''[[3PO-series protocol droid#3PO units|3PO units]]'''
